focus: RQ2 presentation ownership + typed inline-exception (memory/search hard-render-reminder; contract owner+exceptions[]; intent-aware S5; audience/determinism discriminator; triple-path drift root of AL6)
noveltyJustification: Reframes AL3 to a two-field contract (owner + exceptions[] with reason enum); isolates triple-path drift as AL6 root-cause; designs an intent-aware leak check so memory/search is sanctioned by mechanism not allowlist.

ruledOut.approach: Hardcode an allowlist of inline-tolerant commands
ruledOut.reason: Preserves the regeneration defect (012 A7) and rots when a new render-fidelity command appears.
